caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, glasses, and a distinctive grey wig styled into a tall, pointed peak. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a clothing display rack featuring a "LEE" brand garment. To his left, a white logo reads "THE TALK SHOW PODCAST," and to his right, a logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and gaze while appearing to speak. His facial expression remains relatively neutral as he looks toward someone or something off-camera to the right. The setting and equipment remain static across the frames, with only slight movements in the man's posture and head position.
